note: These estimates are unrounded counts, which should be used with caution.
subtitle: Estimates are based on how people describe their own religious identity. This self-identification is taken regardless of their practices or beliefs. Estimates include Baha'is, Daoists (also spelled Taoists), Jains, Shintoists, Sikhs, Wiccans, Zoroastrians, and many small groups, some of which can be described as folk or traditional religions.
